name: The Light of Tarot
description: This essay has been folded into How the Cards Can Work. Its argument — Tolkien's sub-creation and Recovery, and 'the light of the tarot is in the eyes of the beholder' — lives there now, in the closing section 'Sub-creation — why the pictures are enough'.

sections.Content:
*This essay has been folded into **[How the Cards Can Work](course-viewer.html?course=how-tarot-works)** — see its closing section, "Sub-creation — why the pictures are enough," for Tolkien's sub-creation and Recovery, and for the closing thought that the light of the tarot is in the eyes of the beholder.*

Kept here only so old links still resolve.
